    [1m[94m|[0m
    [1m[94m= [0m[1mhelp[0m: consider using an async-aware `Mutex` type or ensuring the `MutexGuard` is dropped before calling `await`
[1m[92mnote[0m: these are all the await points this lock is held through
   [1m[94m--> [0msrc/bin/tui/../../../tests/unit/unit_bin_tui_message_handlers.rs:209:6
